meta.description: CSB Portal bridge-mode task registry seeded from legacy docs/plans.

tasks.title: Estimate Workflow Continuity
tasks.next_action: Validate and continue: Quick Estimator restores active local state.
tasks.notes:
Imported from docs/plans/01-estimate-workflow-continuity.md.

Business problem:
- Estimate work is not resumable.
- Saved estimates cannot be reopened in Quick Estimator for editing.
- Estimate drafts are not accessible in the estimator UI.
- Estimate location data is incomplete and does not fully transfer into RFQ.

Target behavior:
- Quick Estimator restores active local state.
- Quick Estimator exposes saved drafts with load and delete actions.
- Quick Estimator can load an existing estimate for editing.
- Estimates Log supports edit routing back into Quick Estimator.
- Estimates store city, province, and postalCode.
- RFQ import from estimates carries all three location fields.

Tests needed:
- Estimate row mapper round-trip with city and postalCode.
- Estimate-to-RFQ location transfer.
- Draft storage/load helper behavior.

Risk:
- Low to medium

tasks.title: RFQ Continuity and Estimator Visibility
tasks.next_action: Validate and continue: RFQ save routes to the created log entry and highlights it.
tasks.notes:
Imported from docs/plans/02-rfq-continuity-and-estimator-visibility.md.

Business problem:
- RFQ creation is not visibly continuous.
- Estimator queues are not restricted tightly enough.
- RFQ detail views are too generic for review work.

Target behavior:
- RFQ save routes to the created log entry and highlights it.
- Quote Log supports log and pipeline views with admin user filtering.
- Estimator-only views show only assigned or explicitly submitted RFQs.
- Expanded RFQ detail view shows normalized building/location/accessory data plus PDF actions.

Tests needed:
- Estimator queue filtering
- RFQ row focus/highlight on redirect
- Expanded RFQ detail rendering

Risk:
- Medium

tasks.title: Production and Deal Lifecycle Integrity
tasks.next_action: Validate and continue: Deals created from quotes can be reverted back to the source quote.
tasks.notes:
Imported from docs/plans/03-production-and-deal-lifecycle-integrity.md.

Business problem:
- Mistaken deal conversions are hard to unwind.
- Production lifecycle ownership is split across two domain models.

Target behavior:
- Deals created from quotes can be reverted back to the source quote.
- Source quote regains quote_sent workflow and Sent status.
- deals remains the temporary canonical production state until a larger redesign lands.

Tests needed:
- Quote -> deal -> quote transition
- Production status persistence on deals

Risk:
- Medium

tasks.title: Operations Workspace and Import Reliability
tasks.next_action: Validate and continue: Group operations tooling together in the sidebar.
tasks.notes:
Imported from docs/plans/04-operations-workspace-and-import-reliability.md.

Business problem:
- Operations tools are scattered.
- Import and cost-calculation complaints are not protected by regression coverage.

Target behavior:
- Group operations tooling together in the sidebar.
- Audit and fix parser-to-builder mapping for weight, $ / lb, total cost, and job ID loading.
- Add regression tests before making duplicate-document logic changes.

Tests needed:
- Parser extraction regression tests
- Internal quote import/mapping tests

Risk:
- Low to medium

tasks.title: Opportunity and Post-Sale Pipeline Foundation
tasks.next_action: Validate and continue: Define opportunities as the parent lifecycle object for RFQs, quotes, and deals.
tasks.notes:
Imported from docs/plans/05-opportunity-and-post-sale-pipeline-foundation.md.

Business problem:
- RFQs, quotes, dealer requests, and deals do not share a stable parent CRM object.
- Post-sale milestones are implicit instead of modeled.

Target behavior:
- Define opportunities as the parent lifecycle object for RFQs, quotes, and deals.
- Track potential revenue and lifecycle state: open, won, lost, abandoned.
- Define the post-sale milestone model before implementation.

Tests needed:
- Lifecycle integrity
- Deal conversion and reversion path coverage
- Opportunity visibility and permission rules

Risk:
- High
files: Later: migrations, types, context, deal pages, and workflow pages
